purpose: Scaffolds and validates TypeScript-first Pi Protocol certified node packages while participating as a certified node itself.

provides.name: describe_certified_template
provides.description: Describe the expected TypeScript package structure and required runtime behaviors for a certified node template.

provides.name: scaffold_certified_node
provides.description: Generate a TypeScript-first protocol-certified node package template from structured input.

provides.name: scaffold_collaborating_nodes
provides.description: Generate two collaborating TypeScript-first protocol-certified node packages aligned with the shared fabric, standard protocol projection, and protocol-native delegation surfaces.

provides.name: validate_certified_node
provides.description: Validate a candidate package directory against the current Pi Protocol certification rules.
